help.short: The name of the NetApp account
The name of the cache resource.
The name of the capacity pool

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleIndex">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="mountTargets" identifiers="mountTargetId">
<prop type="array" name="peerAddresses" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="protocolTypes">
<prop type="array" name="zones">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The name of the NetApp account
The name of the cache resource.
The name of the capacity pool
The name of the NetApp account
The name of the cache resource.
The name of the capacity pool
Enables access-based enumeration share property for SMB Shares. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol volume
Enables encryption for in-flight smb3 data. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol cache.
Enables non-browsable property for SMB Shares. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol volume

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$body.properties.exportPolicy.rules" identifiers="ruleIndex">
<prop type="array" name="peerAddresses" arg="$body.properties.originClusterInformation.peerAddresses" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="protocolTypes" arg="$body.properties.protocolTypes">
<prop type="array" name="zones" arg="$body.zones">

<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleIndex">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="mountTargets" identifiers="mountTargetId">
<prop type="array" name="peerAddresses" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="protocolTypes">
<prop type="array" name="zones">

command.name: update

help.short: The name of the NetApp account
The name of the cache resource.
The name of the capacity pool

command.argGroup: <arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$body.properties.exportPolicy.rules" options="export-policy-rules rules" group="ExportPolicy">

help.short: Enables access-based enumeration share property for SMB Shares. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol volume
Enables encryption for in-flight smb3 data. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol cache.
Enables non-browsable property for SMB Shares. Only applicable for SMB/DualProtocol volume

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleIndex">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="mountTargets" identifiers="mountTargetId">
<prop type="array" name="peerAddresses" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="protocolTypes">
<prop type="array" name="zones">

<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$body.properties.exportPolicy.rules" identifiers="ruleIndex">
<prop type="array" name="protocolTypes" arg="$body.properties.protocolTypes">
